items.name: Flat · spacious · left controls
items.description: Flat square card, 1.4x airier spacing, window controls on the left. Showcases the composable DENSITY + STYLE + POSITION axes (Spec 086). Merges ONLY the chrome slice — terminal colors and fonts stay yours.

items.name: KDE-like chassis
items.description: Breeze-style window controls with the subtitle bound to the working-directory provider and gently rounded corners. Merges ONLY the chrome slice — terminal colors and fonts stay yours. (No minimize slot exists, so Breeze's dash control is dropped.)

items.name: macOS-like chassis
items.description: Round traffic-light window controls, minimal labels, rounded card. Merges ONLY the chrome slice — terminal colors and fonts stay yours. Control/LED colors follow your palette's status borders (no per-glyph color knob exists).

items.name: Windows-like chassis
items.description: Square flat window controls with visible text labels (RUN/OK/ERR, exit status + runtime in the footer) and squared corners. Merges ONLY the chrome slice — terminal colors and fonts stay yours.
